c1_prepend.after: Generic is held by [[Natural Order]] and [[Root Order]]. The dependency order must hold and natural order must be operative before a structural pattern can generate instances from a prior source.

c1_prepend.title: Groundedness
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Groundedness is held by [[Root Order]]. Dependency arrangement must hold before remaining answerable to it can be named.
c1_prepend.before: In the Atlas, Groundedness is also the root-contact check on a note: grounded where the note remains answerable to what holds it; ungrounded where its traces still require checking. This is not the sa
c1_prepend.after: Groundedness is held by [[Root Order]]. Dependency arrangement must hold before remaining answerable to it can be named.

c1_prepend.title: Invariant
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Invariant is held by [[Root Order]].
c1_prepend.before: [[Bounded Asymmetry]] is the structural invariant of Reality Mechanics: it holds across domain, scale, and application.
c1_prepend.after: Invariant is held by [[Root Order]].

c1_prepend.title: Label
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Label is held by [[Root Order]]. Dependency arrangement must hold before naming of any kind can occur, including marking without conditions.
c1_prepend.before: A label is not a failed term. Proper names, placeholders, tags, and identifiers operate legitimately as labels — marking a point without needing to carry conditions. The distinction is structural: a l
c1_prepend.after: Label is held by [[Root Order]]. Dependency arrangement must hold before naming of any kind can occur, including marking without conditions.

c1_prepend.title: Natural Order
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Natural Order is held by [[Root Order]].
c1_prepend.before: Natural Order does not require entry by read in order to hold. A read may enter Natural Order, trace it, name it, measure it, act within it, or alter the relation it joins, but the read does not creat
c1_prepend.after: Natural Order is held by [[Root Order]].

c1_prepend.title: Passage Condition
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Passage Condition is held by [[Root Order]]. The governing arrangement must hold before regulative roles within it can be named.
c1_prepend.before: [[Boundary]] and [[Availability]] are the primary passage conditions of the first order. [[Allow]], [[Compatibility]], [[Scope]], and [[Closure Scope]] extend this role into later orders.
c1_prepend.after: Passage Condition is held by [[Root Order]]. The governing arrangement must hold before regulative roles within it can be named.

c1_prepend.title: Regenerate
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Regenerate is held by [[Generic]] and [[Degenerate]]. A generative source must be operative and its loss must be nameable before the return to that source can be placed.
c1_prepend.before: Regenerate is recovery, not replacement. The carrying does not stop; the trace to what carries the carrying is restored.
c1_prepend.after: Regenerate is held by [[Generic]] and [[Degenerate]]. A generative source must be operative and its loss must be nameable before the return to that source can be placed.

c1_prepend.title: Root Order
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Root Order is held by [[Ground]], because the system must acknowledge what precedes its own derivation before it can order dependency.
c1_prepend.before: Root Order also makes that arrangement followable: terms can be followed by what must already hold for them to remain available.
c1_prepend.after: Root Order is held by [[Ground]], because the system must acknowledge what precedes its own derivation before it can order dependency.

c1_prepend.title: Seed
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Seed is held by [[Ground]] — present before the chain begins, requiring only the acknowledged prior in order to hold.
c1_prepend.before: Seed may exist without generating. Ground may exist without producing Seed. Generation begins when Seed : Ground becomes active relation.
c1_prepend.after: Seed is held by [[Ground]] — present before the chain begins, requiring only the acknowledged prior in order to hold.

c1_prepend.title: Structural Disorder
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Structural Disorder is held by [[Root Order]].
c1_prepend.before: Structural Disorder is shaded order, not a thing beside order. It names where order cannot be cleanly retraced because what must hold has become obscured, lacking, residue-bearing, or unreadable.
c1_prepend.after: Structural Disorder is held by [[Root Order]].

c1_prepend.title: Term
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Term is held by [[Root Order]].
c1_prepend.before: A word or sign becomes a term where meaning, dependency, and opening can travel together. Different carriers may hold the same term where that structural placement remains recoverable; the same word m
c1_prepend.after: Term is held by [[Root Order]].

c1_prepend.title: Distinction
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Distinction is held by [[Bounded Asymmetry]]. Asymmetry must be local enough for this and not-this to become distinguishable before distinction can be named.
c1_prepend.before: [[Asymmetry]] makes distinction possible. [[Bounded Asymmetry]] makes the unevenness local enough to distinguish. Distinction names that distinguishability itself. [[Boundary]] then locates it; [[Diff
c1_prepend.after: Distinction is held by [[Bounded Asymmetry]]. Asymmetry must be local enough for this and not-this to become distinguishable before distinction can be named.

c1_prepend.title: Allow
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Allow is held by [[Boundary]], [[Availability]], and [[Passage Condition]]. Scope must be bounded and distinction present before permission at that scope can be read.
c1_prepend.before: Agreement, approval, consent, or moral permission can involve allow, but allow first names what a condition permits at a boundary or scope.
c1_prepend.after: Allow is held by [[Boundary]], [[Availability]], and [[Passage Condition]]. Scope must be bounded and distinction present before permission at that scope can be read.

c1_prepend.title: Contact
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Contact is held by [[Boundary]], [[Clearance]], and [[Tact]]. Boundary locates distinction, clearance can close into meeting, and tact keeps contact from collapsing into interference, pressure, or har
c1_prepend.before: Contact can support later carrying, resistance, grip, or traction through [[Coupled Contact]].
c1_prepend.after: Contact is held by [[Boundary]], [[Clearance]], and [[Tact]]. Boundary locates distinction, clearance can close into meeting, and tact keeps contact from collapsing into interference, pressure, or har

c1_prepend.title: Attend
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Attend is held by [[Notice]], [[Enter]], and [[Availability]].
c1_prepend.before: Attend comes before judgment, closure, or explanation. It keeps contact open without forcing the condition to resolve before its difference can be read.
c1_prepend.after: Attend is held by [[Notice]], [[Enter]], and [[Availability]].

c1_prepend.title: Carry
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Carry is held by [[Hold]] and [[Connection]]. Connection must remain held for forward passage through it to be available — Hold does not finish before Carry begins; Carry is held support becoming avai
c1_prepend.before: Carry is not yet [[Carrying]]. Carry names the passage connection offers where relation is held enough for forward availability to remain traceable. Carrying names movement through that passage. A con
c1_prepend.after: Carry is held by [[Hold]] and [[Connection]]. Connection must remain held for forward passage through it to be available — Hold does not finish before Carry begins; Carry is held support becoming avai

c1_prepend.title: Enter
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Enter is held by [[Notice]], [[Boundary]], [[Threshold]], [[Allow]], and [[Space]].
c1_prepend.before: Enter is not the same as [[Allow]]. Allow names permitted passage from the condition side; Enter names taken passage from the participating side.
c1_prepend.after: Enter is held by [[Notice]], [[Boundary]], [[Threshold]], [[Allow]], and [[Space]].

c1_prepend.title: Not
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Not is held by [[Boundary]] and [[Availability]]. Scope must be bounded, and availability must be readable, before non-availability can be marked.
c1_prepend.before: Not marks that what cannot be reached, traced, or carried within the current structure is not available here.
c1_prepend.after: Not is held by [[Boundary]] and [[Availability]]. Scope must be bounded, and availability must be readable, before non-availability can be marked.

c1_prepend.title: Notice
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Notice is held by [[Apparent]] and [[Availability]]. Something must be available enough to appear before it can be noticed.
c1_prepend.before: Notice comes before enter, attend, or trace. It is the first contact that makes passage, attention, and trace possible.
c1_prepend.after: Notice is held by [[Apparent]] and [[Availability]]. Something must be available enough to appear before it can be noticed.

c1_prepend.title: Place
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Place is held by [[Relation]]. Relation must remain available for any operation to become locatable within it — Relation does not finish before Place begins; Place is Relation's own availability made
c1_prepend.before: Place is not location alone. A location can be named without the operation being placed in Atlas order. Place names the availability of a locatable position through which relation, holding, carrying,
c1_prepend.after: Place is held by [[Relation]]. Relation must remain available for any operation to become locatable within it — Relation does not finish before Place begins; Place is Relation's own availability made

c1_prepend.title: Read
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Read is held by [[Trace]]. The distinction must remain followable for it to be taken up as meaningful — trace does not finish before read begins; a read may widen or recur without exhausting the trace
c1_prepend.before: Read enters order; it does not create order. Once entered, read participates in what it traces: it can clarify, distort, repair, accelerate, name, measure, or alter the relation it has entered. The qu
c1_prepend.after: Read is held by [[Trace]]. The distinction must remain followable for it to be taken up as meaningful — trace does not finish before read begins; a read may widen or recur without exhausting the trace

c1_prepend.title: Thread
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Thread is held by [[Term]], [[Trace]], and [[Read]].
c1_prepend.before: [[Fabric]] names many threads held together as woven continuity. Thread is the strand that can be followed before the fabric has to be read as a whole.
c1_prepend.after: Thread is held by [[Term]], [[Trace]], and [[Read]].

c1_prepend.title: Trace
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Trace is held by [[Hold]] and [[Connection]]. Connection must remain held for a backward path through it to be available — Hold does not finish before Trace begins; Trace is held support becoming avai
c1_prepend.before: Trace is not yet [[Retracing]]. Trace names the path connection offers where relation is held enough for backward availability to remain readable. Retracing names movement back through that path. A co
c1_prepend.after: Trace is held by [[Hold]] and [[Connection]]. Connection must remain held for a backward path through it to be available — Hold does not finish before Trace begins; Trace is held support becoming avai

c1_prepend.title: Clean
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Clean is held by [[Relation]]. Relation must hold before anything can be cleanly read, handled, separated, or met.
c1_prepend.before: Clean is hidden in many successful reads because it is not always the visible operation. Clear reading and tactful contact both depend on it.
c1_prepend.after: Clean is held by [[Relation]]. Relation must hold before anything can be cleanly read, handled, separated, or met.

c1_prepend.title: First Order
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: First Order is held by [[Root Order]]. Its terms follow dependency arrangement rather than topic sequence.
c1_prepend.before: In the tree read, First Order is root structure becoming readable. It is rooted in [[Ground]] and grows toward the trunk; its work is to make later carrying possible.
c1_prepend.after: First Order is held by [[Root Order]]. Its terms follow dependency arrangement rather than topic sequence.

c1_prepend.title: One
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: One is held by [[Seed]]. Seed names the source-side condition through which the first readable reference can appear without claiming to generate itself or replace Seed : Ground.
c1_prepend.before: One is not an isolated object, a counted unit, or a self-originating substance. It is the first held reference through which a read can begin. Without One, there is no place from which comparison can
c1_prepend.after: One is held by [[Seed]]. Seed names the source-side condition through which the first readable reference can appear without claiming to generate itself or replace Seed : Ground.

c1_prepend.title: Other
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Other is held by [[One]] and [[Seed]]. A reference must remain held, and the source-side availability must remain acknowledged, while Other is read as distinct rather than mere negation.
c1_prepend.before: Other is not merely negation. It is not whatever One rejects. Other is the distinguishable not-same that lets One be a reference rather than an unbounded whole.
c1_prepend.after: Other is held by [[One]] and [[Seed]]. A reference must remain held, and the source-side availability must remain acknowledged, while Other is read as distinct rather than mere negation.

c1_prepend.title: Posture
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Posture is held by [[Connection]] and [[Asymmetry]]. Connection must remain held as a passage, and asymmetry must continue giving that passage direction, while order proceeds through the oriented hold
c1_prepend.before: [[Connection]] gives a held and placeable passage. Posture names what happens when that passage is not merely present but directed — when the holding has a toward-ness that lets order begin to emerge.
c1_prepend.after: Posture is held by [[Connection]] and [[Asymmetry]]. Connection must remain held as a passage, and asymmetry must continue giving that passage direction, while order proceeds through the oriented hold

c1_prepend.title: Ratio
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Ratio is held by [[One]], [[Other]], and [[Clearance]]. A reference and distinction must be readable, and enough held separation must remain, before relation can be read as ratio without collapse.
c1_prepend.before: Ratio is not first a number. Number can formalise ratio later. Ratio is the readable form through which distinguishable terms can remain in accountable relation without collapse. It needs a held refer
c1_prepend.after: Ratio is held by [[One]], [[Other]], and [[Clearance]]. A reference and distinction must be readable, and enough held separation must remain, before relation can be read as ratio without collapse.

c1_prepend.title: Clearance
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Clearance is held by [[Relation]] and [[Clear]]: relation must hold, and it must be readable enough for separation to become clearance rather than vague absence.
c1_prepend.before: Space and time are not first containers. They are first reads of clearance. [[Space]] reads clearance as separation, extent, or placement. [[Time]] reads clearance as interval, continuation, or rate.
c1_prepend.after: Clearance is held by [[Relation]] and [[Clear]]: relation must hold, and it must be readable enough for separation to become clearance rather than vague absence.

c1_prepend.title: Time
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Time is held by [[Clearance]]. Relation must remain apart enough to continue without collapsing into static sameness.
c1_prepend.before: Downstream, time becomes readable as the rate and scale at which an order resolves. Different systems do not have different kinds of time first; they resolve held clearance at different rates and scal
c1_prepend.after: Time is held by [[Clearance]]. Relation must remain apart enough to continue without collapsing into static sameness.

c1_prepend.title: Resolution
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Resolution is held by [[Bearing]] and [[Clearance]]. Strain must be held, and relation must remain apart enough for change across the difference to become readable as a determined condition.
c1_prepend.before: Resolution traces from [[Clearance]] because change can only resolve where relation remains held apart enough for difference to be readable. [[Space]] reads that clearance as separation or extent. [[T
c1_prepend.after: Resolution is held by [[Bearing]] and [[Clearance]]. Strain must be held, and relation must remain apart enough for change across the difference to become readable as a determined condition.

c1_prepend.title: Adaptation
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Adaptation is held by [[Bounded Asymmetry]], [[Resolution]], [[Shift]], [[Carrying]], [[Compatibility]], and [[Closure Scope]]. Asymmetry must remain bounded, local resolution must occur, and carrying
c1_prepend.before: Adaptation is not permanent openness and not refusal of resolution. Local resolutions can be complete. The click is real. What remains open is whether the resolved relation can later be re-entered, re
c1_prepend.after: Adaptation is held by [[Bounded Asymmetry]], [[Resolution]], [[Shift]], [[Carrying]], [[Compatibility]], and [[Closure Scope]]. Asymmetry must remain bounded, local resolution must occur, and carrying

c1_prepend.title: Apparent Source
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Apparent Source is held by [[Apparent]], [[Trace]], [[Carrying]], and [[Structure]]. A structure must be presented, carrying must be active, and trace must be available to test whether the presented s
c1_prepend.before: A structure may be visible, proximal, authoritative, fluent, stable, or powerful enough to appear as source. Apparent Source does not mean the structure is unreal or carries nothing. It means the stru
c1_prepend.after: Apparent Source is held by [[Apparent]], [[Trace]], [[Carrying]], and [[Structure]]. A structure must be presented, carrying must be active, and trace must be available to test whether the presented s

c1_prepend.title: Balance
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Balance is held by [[Pressure]], [[Retain]], [[Release]], [[Compatibility]], and [[Capacity]]. Pressure must be locally borne, retention and release must be available, and carrying must remain compati
c1_prepend.before: Balance is not stillness, symmetry, equality, or equal amount. It may be dynamic, uneven, rhythmic, responsive, and continuously adjusting. A body balancing, a building carrying load, a relationship b
c1_prepend.after: Balance is held by [[Pressure]], [[Retain]], [[Release]], [[Compatibility]], and [[Capacity]]. Pressure must be locally borne, retention and release must be available, and carrying must remain compati

c1_prepend.title: Bearing Source
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Bearing Source is held by [[Bearing]], [[Trace]], [[Carrying]], and [[Structure]]. Carrying must be present, bearing must be active, structure must be doing the holding, and a trace must be available
c1_prepend.before: It is not a separate source-object behind relation. In the Atlas sense, structure is ordered relation that bears. Bearing Source names the structural role from which a carried condition receives its a
c1_prepend.after: Bearing Source is held by [[Bearing]], [[Trace]], [[Carrying]], and [[Structure]]. Carrying must be present, bearing must be active, structure must be doing the holding, and a trace must be available

c1_prepend.title: Carried Condition
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Carried Condition is held by [[Carrying]], [[Ground]], [[Load]], [[Capacity]], and [[Overload]].
c1_prepend.before: The root sentence is:
c1_prepend.after: Carried Condition is held by [[Carrying]], [[Ground]], [[Load]], [[Capacity]], and [[Overload]].

c1_prepend.title: Consequence
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Consequence is held by [[Effect]], [[Carrying]], and [[Trace]]. An effect must be present, its continuation must be carried, and the later condition must remain traceable to that effect before consequ
c1_prepend.before: [[Effect]] names change carried through coupling from one condition into another. Consequence names what happens where that effect does not end at the coupling in which it first became readable: it co
c1_prepend.after: Consequence is held by [[Effect]], [[Carrying]], and [[Trace]]. An effect must be present, its continuation must be carried, and the later condition must remain traceable to that effect before consequ

c1_prepend.title: Energy
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Energy is held by [[Generic]], [[Carrying]], [[Capacity]], [[Pressure]], and [[Flow]].
c1_prepend.before: This does not replace physical, biological, or domain-specific definitions of energy. It places what energy does in the Atlas order: energy names availability generated within a condition that can car
c1_prepend.after: Energy is held by [[Generic]], [[Carrying]], [[Capacity]], [[Pressure]], and [[Flow]].

c1_prepend.title: Extend
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Extend is held by [[Carrying]], [[Relation]], [[Boundary]], [[Trace]], and [[Compatibility]]. Carrying must continue beyond a current scope, cross or reach a boundary, remain traceable to the relation
c1_prepend.before: Expansion can increase scope, size, reach, or effect. Extend names the carrying movement by which a condition reaches beyond its current boundary without becoming detached from what bears it.
c1_prepend.after: Extend is held by [[Carrying]], [[Relation]], [[Boundary]], [[Trace]], and [[Compatibility]]. Carrying must continue beyond a current scope, cross or reach a boundary, remain traceable to the relation

c1_prepend.title: Extent
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Extent is held by [[Extend]], [[Carrying]], [[Boundary]], and [[Trace]]. Carrying must reach outward, the reach must be locatable, and trace must remain available before extent can be named.
c1_prepend.before: Where [[Extend]] names carrying outward beyond a current boundary, Extent names the range that carrying has reached. Extent does not mean universal completion. It asks how far carrying reaches before
c1_prepend.after: Extent is held by [[Extend]], [[Carrying]], [[Boundary]], and [[Trace]]. Carrying must reach outward, the reach must be locatable, and trace must remain available before extent can be named.

c1_prepend.title: Growth
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Growth is held by [[Change]], [[Scale]], and [[Carrying]].
c1_prepend.before: Growth is not only faster output. Increase that depends on drawing down a hidden carrier may be read locally as growth while becoming extraction at a wider scope. Growth must remain answerable to what
c1_prepend.after: Growth is held by [[Change]], [[Scale]], and [[Carrying]].

c1_prepend.title: Guard
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Guard is held by [[Boundary]], [[Availability]], [[Carrying]], [[Constraint]], and [[Compatibility]]. A boundary must locate what is at stake, carrying must maintain it, constraint must regulate passa
c1_prepend.before: Guard is not inherently caring or controlling. It names the maintained boundary condition first. Later reads show what the guarding serves and what effects it produces.
c1_prepend.after: Guard is held by [[Boundary]], [[Availability]], [[Carrying]], [[Constraint]], and [[Compatibility]]. A boundary must locate what is at stake, carrying must maintain it, constraint must regulate passa

c1_prepend.title: Integration
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Integration is held by [[Intake]], [[Resolution]], [[Regulation]], and [[Compatibility]]. What enters must be available within carrying, resolved enough to participate, maintainable within the receivi
c1_prepend.before: [[Intake]] names availability crossing inward through a boundary. Integration names what happens where that intake becomes carried by the receiving order: it can participate in the condition, affect i
c1_prepend.after: Integration is held by [[Intake]], [[Resolution]], [[Regulation]], and [[Compatibility]]. What enters must be available within carrying, resolved enough to participate, maintainable within the receivi

c1_prepend.title: Medium
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Medium is held by [[Carrying]], [[Participation]], and [[Allow]].
c1_prepend.before: A medium allows some reads while thinning or blocking others. A phone call may allow voice, tone, and timing while not allowing enough behaviour read for some relational repair.
c1_prepend.after: Medium is held by [[Carrying]], [[Participation]], and [[Allow]].

c1_prepend.title: Pressure
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Pressure is held by [[Load]], [[Relation]], [[Boundary]], [[Capacity]], and [[Compatibility]]. Load must meet a local carrying relation, and the boundary, capacity, and compatibility of that relation
c1_prepend.before: Pressure is not load alone and not the carrier alone. It appears where load meets a local carrying relation. This is why pressure can be generative: it is the active edge where carrying becomes felt,
c1_prepend.after: Pressure is held by [[Load]], [[Relation]], [[Boundary]], [[Capacity]], and [[Compatibility]]. Load must meet a local carrying relation, and the boundary, capacity, and compatibility of that relation

c1_prepend.title: Recarry
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Recarry is held by [[Carrying]], [[Trace]], [[Contact]], [[Groundedness]], [[Release]], and [[Compatibility]]. Carrying must remain traceable, contact must alter the carrying without erasing it, a cha
c1_prepend.before: What is carried enters contact, meets another read, and comes back still held, but altered by trace. Recarry is not agreement, conversion, or compromise. It names carrying that has been contacted and
c1_prepend.after: Recarry is held by [[Carrying]], [[Trace]], [[Contact]], [[Groundedness]], [[Release]], and [[Compatibility]]. Carrying must remain traceable, contact must alter the carrying without erasing it, a cha

c1_prepend.title: Resolution Rate
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Resolution Rate is held by [[Rate]], [[Resolution]], [[Clearance]], [[Coupling]], [[Carrying]], and [[Nesting Read]]. Rate must be readable, distinction must resolve, relation must retain clearance an
c1_prepend.before: Resolution Rate is not simple speed. It is the speed at which relation can be read, resolved, and acted through without losing [[Coupling]], [[Clearance]], or trace. Speed measures movement. Resolutio
c1_prepend.after: Resolution Rate is held by [[Rate]], [[Resolution]], [[Clearance]], [[Coupling]], [[Carrying]], and [[Nesting Read]]. Rate must be readable, distinction must resolve, relation must retain clearance an

c1_prepend.title: Resonance
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Resonance is held by [[Frequency]], [[Coupling]], [[Pattern]], [[Compatibility]], and [[Capacity]]. Recurrence must have readable rate or pattern, distinct conditions must couple, and the carrier must
c1_prepend.before: Resonance is not sameness. It is not difference alone. It becomes readable where distinct conditions can carry a shared frequency, rhythm, pattern, or relation strongly enough that one moves, amplifie
c1_prepend.after: Resonance is held by [[Frequency]], [[Coupling]], [[Pattern]], [[Compatibility]], and [[Capacity]]. Recurrence must have readable rate or pattern, distinct conditions must couple, and the carrier must

c1_prepend.title: Retain
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Retain is held by [[Pressure]], [[Carrying]], [[Compatibility]], and [[Hold]]. Pressure must be locally borne, carrying must remain available, and holding must remain compatible before pressure can be
c1_prepend.before: Retain is not the same as [[Hold]]. Hold is a first-order resolution mode: a resolved condition remains supportable as the same condition. Retain is second-order carrying regulation: pressure remains
c1_prepend.after: Retain is held by [[Pressure]], [[Carrying]], [[Compatibility]], and [[Hold]]. Pressure must be locally borne, carrying must remain available, and holding must remain compatible before pressure can be

c1_prepend.title: Carrying
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Carrying is held by [[Hold]] and [[Carry]]. Forward passage remains held while it is enacted as carrying.
c1_prepend.before: [[Carry]] is the forward passage this ratio reads forward through. What carries may be resolved, strained, changing, or still being formed; [[Resolution]] can shape carrying without being a universal
c1_prepend.after: Carrying is held by [[Hold]] and [[Carry]]. Forward passage remains held while it is enacted as carrying.

c1_prepend.title: Order-Terminal
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Order-terminal is held by [[Term]], [[Thread]], and [[Terminal]]. A term carries a readable length; thread carries the continuity of the read through that length; terminal names the limit of readabili
c1_prepend.before: A term carries a readable length of relation. [[Terminal]] names where a current read stops because continuation crosses a closure scope the read cannot follow. Order-terminal marks the term-position
c1_prepend.after: Order-terminal is held by [[Term]], [[Thread]], and [[Terminal]]. A term carries a readable length; thread carries the continuity of the read through that length; terminal names the limit of readabili

c1_prepend.title: Return
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Return is held by [[Boundary]], [[Carrying]], and [[Readability]]. Relation must continue, a boundary must locate a distinguishable entry, and that boundary must fall within a resolution band able to
c1_prepend.before: Return is not repetition. Repetition is the apparent occurrence of the same event again. Return requires a carried relation to remain traceable across the difference between entries. A return is not g
c1_prepend.after: Return is held by [[Boundary]], [[Carrying]], and [[Readability]]. Relation must continue, a boundary must locate a distinguishable entry, and that boundary must fall within a resolution band able to

c1_prepend.title: Closure Scope
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Closure Scope is held by [[Closure]], [[Scope]], and [[Extent]]. Closure bounds the read, scope locates where it can hold, and extent locates the reached range.
c1_prepend.before: Closure Scope protects against two opposite failures. Overclaim treats a local closure as total and stops carrying what falls outside the declared scope. Refusal of scope prevents local closure altoge
c1_prepend.after: Closure Scope is held by [[Closure]], [[Scope]], and [[Extent]]. Closure bounds the read, scope locates where it can hold, and extent locates the reached range.

c1_prepend.title: Condition, State, and View
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Condition, State, and View is held by [[Condition]], [[Readability]], and [[Closure Scope]]. A condition must be readable as holding, reading must remain possible, and the scope of evaluation must be
c1_prepend.before: A condition is relation readable as holding within a [[Closure Scope]]. A state is a frozen or sectioned read of a condition. A view is the position, [[Section]], projection, or read path through whic
c1_prepend.after: Condition, State, and View is held by [[Condition]], [[Readability]], and [[Closure Scope]]. A condition must be readable as holding, reading must remain possible, and the scope of evaluation must be

c1_prepend.title: Coupled Contact
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Coupled Contact is held by [[Contact]], [[Coupling]], and [[Presence]]. Contact must remain locally available and held in relation while it carries effect.
c1_prepend.before: A tyre touching the road is [[Contact]]. A tyre gripping the road so that braking and steering effects can pass through the tyre-road relation is Coupled Contact.
c1_prepend.after: Coupled Contact is held by [[Contact]], [[Coupling]], and [[Presence]]. Contact must remain locally available and held in relation while it carries effect.

c1_prepend.title: Effect

c1_prepend.after: Effect is held by [[Coupling]], [[Carrying]], and [[Change]]. Conditions must be coupled, carrying must pass through the relation, and a readable change must occur before effect can be named.

c1_prepend.title: Coupling
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Coupling is held by [[Resolved Asymmetry]] and [[Carrying]]. Distinct conditions must be determined and carried enough to become mutually available.
c1_prepend.before: Coupled relation connects. Contact can meet without coupling; a link can point without bearing; a category can group without participation. Coupling holds distinct resolved conditions in mutual availa
c1_prepend.after: Coupling is held by [[Resolved Asymmetry]] and [[Carrying]]. Distinct conditions must be determined and carried enough to become mutually available.

c1_prepend.title: Nested Relation
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Nested Relation is held by [[Within]] and [[Nesting Read]].

c1_prepend.title: Occur

c1_prepend.after: Occur is held by [[Presence]] and [[Closure Scope]].

c1_prepend.title: Count

c1_prepend.after: Count is held by [[Recurrence]] and [[Unit]].

c1_prepend.title: Disorder
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Disorder is held by [[Stability]] and [[Strain]].
c1_prepend.before: Disorder is shaded order, not a positive thing beside order. It is order under loss, occlusion, interruption, residue, or unreadability at the current scope.
c1_prepend.after: Disorder is held by [[Stability]] and [[Strain]].

c1_prepend.title: Face

c1_prepend.after: Hertz is held by [[Frequency]] and [[Unit]].

c1_prepend.title: Kind

c1_prepend.title: Number
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Number is held by [[Count]], [[Root Order]], and [[Term]].

c1_prepend.title: Atlasing
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Atlasing is held by [[Atlas]], [[Common Term Structure]], and [[Reality-Bearing Connection]].
c1_prepend.before: Atlasing treats a term as a participation handle rather than a static definition: a placed way to enter relation without losing dependency, bearing, or return path.
c1_prepend.after: Atlasing is held by [[Atlas]], [[Common Term Structure]], and [[Reality-Bearing Connection]].

c1_prepend.title: Bearing Pass
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Bearing Pass is held by [[Atlas Fabric]], [[Check]], [[Carry-Trace Test]], and [[Resolution Rate]]. The fabric must provide the care frame, Check must locate the boundary of the member, Carry-Trace Te
c1_prepend.before: The pass is deliberately ordinary. It keeps the structural read from becoming a metaphor without practice.
c1_prepend.after: Bearing Pass is held by [[Atlas Fabric]], [[Check]], [[Carry-Trace Test]], and [[Resolution Rate]]. The fabric must provide the care frame, Check must locate the boundary of the member, Carry-Trace Te

c1_prepend.title: Care-Control Check
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Care-Control Check is held by [[Ark Run]], [[Determination]], [[Care]], [[Control]], [[Control Drift]], and [[Check]].
c1_prepend.before: It is not a moral label placed on a person. It is a runtime read of generated force.
c1_prepend.after: Care-Control Check is held by [[Ark Run]], [[Determination]], [[Care]], [[Control]], [[Control Drift]], and [[Check]].

c1_prepend.title: Carry-Trace Test
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Carry-Trace Test is held by [[Common Term Structure]], [[Dependency Order]], [[Trace]], and [[Retracing]]. Term placement, structural precedence, a followable path, and the checking act must be availa
c1_prepend.before: It separates the order operating from the order known. Reality may carry a condition before any participant reads it. The Atlas does not create that carrying through recognition, but it grounds its ow
c1_prepend.after: Carry-Trace Test is held by [[Common Term Structure]], [[Dependency Order]], [[Trace]], and [[Retracing]]. Term placement, structural precedence, a followable path, and the checking act must be availa

c1_prepend.title: Contend
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Contend is held by [[Tend]], [[Strain]], [[Pressure]], [[Resistance]], and [[Boundary]]. A relation must be tended, and that tending must meet pressure or opposition at a boundary, before contending c
c1_prepend.before: Contending is not simply fighting. It is tending where care has to meet opposition without dropping the relation. A participant may contend with a limit, a pressure, an argument, a wound, a competing
c1_prepend.after: Contend is held by [[Tend]], [[Strain]], [[Pressure]], [[Resistance]], and [[Boundary]]. A relation must be tended, and that tending must meet pressure or opposition at a boundary, before contending c

c1_prepend.title: Daylighting
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Daylighting is held by [[Bearing Pass]], [[Structural Disorder]], [[Clear]], and [[Clean]]. A bearing pass must locate the occluded member, structural disorder must name the loss of dependency readabi
c1_prepend.before: Occlusion is not badness and not a rival substance. It is order under cover. Daylighting does not attack the member; it restores the conditions by which the member, its support, and its effects can be
c1_prepend.after: Daylighting is held by [[Bearing Pass]], [[Structural Disorder]], [[Clear]], and [[Clean]]. A bearing pass must locate the occluded member, structural disorder must name the loss of dependency readabi

c1_prepend.title: Decommissioning
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Decommissioning is held by [[Bearing Pass]], [[Release]], and [[Root Resilience]]. A bearing pass must identify the material, release must let the claim go, and root resilience must keep the failure f
c1_prepend.before: Decommissioning is not deletion. It is the practice of letting a claim stop carrying authority without erasing the trace of its failure. A failed posture can show what the order could not hold, what b
c1_prepend.after: Decommissioning is held by [[Bearing Pass]], [[Release]], and [[Root Resilience]]. A bearing pass must identify the material, release must let the claim go, and root resilience must keep the failure f

c1_prepend.title: Degenerative Trace
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Degenerative Trace is held by [[Trace]], [[Degenerate]], [[Carrying]], [[Source Drift]], and [[Regenerate]].
c1_prepend.before: It is not merely a missing trace. It is the readable path of trace-loss inside continuing carrying.
c1_prepend.after: Degenerative Trace is held by [[Trace]], [[Degenerate]], [[Carrying]], [[Source Drift]], and [[Regenerate]].

c1_prepend.title: Determination
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Determination is held by [[Ark Run]], [[Determine]], [[Hold]], [[Trace]], [[Scope]], and [[Check]].
c1_prepend.before: A determination is not simply an answer. It is an answerable hold.
c1_prepend.after: Determination is held by [[Ark Run]], [[Determine]], [[Hold]], [[Trace]], [[Scope]], and [[Check]].

c1_prepend.title: Determine
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Determine is held by [[Pressure]], [[Check]], [[Boundary]], [[Clearance]], and [[Hold]].
c1_prepend.before: It is not the act of producing an absolute answer. It is the act of allowing a determination to hold at the present scope because enough dependency has been retraced for that scope of read.
c1_prepend.after: Determine is held by [[Pressure]], [[Check]], [[Boundary]], [[Clearance]], and [[Hold]].

c1_prepend.title: Generate and Regenerate
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Generate and Regenerate is held by [[Order Generation]], [[Generative Trace]], [[Degenerative Trace]], [[Check]], and [[Recarry]].
c1_prepend.before: It is not the Atlas itself. It is a way to process Atlas work where the trace of generation needs to become re-enterable.
c1_prepend.after: Generate and Regenerate is held by [[Order Generation]], [[Generative Trace]], [[Degenerative Trace]], [[Check]], and [[Recarry]].

c1_prepend.title: Generative Trace
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Generative Trace is held by [[Trace]], [[Generic]], [[Carrying]], [[Regenerate]], and [[Order Generation]].
c1_prepend.before: It is not only a record of what happened. It is a trace of how carrying became possible.
c1_prepend.after: Generative Trace is held by [[Trace]], [[Generic]], [[Carrying]], [[Regenerate]], and [[Order Generation]].

c1_prepend.title: Oracle Carrying Conditions
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Oracle Carrying Conditions is held by [[Atlas Oracle]], [[AI Participation]], [[Check]], [[Care-Control Check]], [[Carried Condition]], and [[Generate and Regenerate]].
c1_prepend.before: Governance is not placed outside the operation. It is carried inside the operation.
c1_prepend.after: Oracle Carrying Conditions is held by [[Atlas Oracle]], [[AI Participation]], [[Check]], [[Care-Control Check]], [[Carried Condition]], and [[Generate and Regenerate]].

c1_prepend.title: Order Generation
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Order Generation is held by [[Order Trace]], [[Regenerate]], [[Count]], [[Recurrence]], and [[Posture]].
c1_prepend.before: It does not make counting, Euclid, or Fibonacci into Atlas terms. They are exemplars that make different kinds of order generation visible.
c1_prepend.after: Order Generation is held by [[Order Trace]], [[Regenerate]], [[Count]], [[Recurrence]], and [[Posture]].

c1_prepend.title: Order Trace
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Order Trace is held by [[Root Order]], [[Relation]], [[Trace]], and [[Atlas Practice]].
c1_prepend.before: It does not replace individual term traces. It gathers the main dependency movement so the reader can see how the orders hang together without forcing every term into one ladder.
c1_prepend.after: Order Trace is held by [[Root Order]], [[Relation]], [[Trace]], and [[Atlas Practice]].

c1_prepend.title: Posture Read
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Posture Read is held by [[Posture]] and [[Atlas Practice]]. Posture must be available as the orientating condition, and Atlas Practice must hold the discipline that lets the experiment be traced, test
c1_prepend.before: A posture is not a proof and not a doctrine. It is how relation is held toward relation so that an order can become constructible. In this read, Euclid is useful as an exemplar because his postulates
c1_prepend.after: Posture Read is held by [[Posture]] and [[Atlas Practice]]. Posture must be available as the orientating condition, and Atlas Practice must hold the discipline that lets the experiment be traced, test

c1_prepend.title: RM System Map
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: RM System Map is held by [[Reality Mechanics]], [[Atlas]], [[Theory]], [[AI Participation]], and [[Ark Run]].
c1_prepend.before: It does not replace the [[Atlas Root]]. It records how the present local and public pieces carry the work.
c1_prepend.after: RM System Map is held by [[Reality Mechanics]], [[Atlas]], [[Theory]], [[AI Participation]], and [[Ark Run]].

c1_prepend.title: Rational
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Rational is held by [[Reasoning]], [[Ratio]], [[Reference Frame]], [[Carrying]], and [[Trace]]. A ratio must be accountably read, the frame must be explicit, carrying must remain answerable, and trace
c1_prepend.before: Rational does not mean logical alone. Logic may be one carrier of rationality, but rationality is wider: the continuation must remain answerable to the relation it reads, the reference frame through w
c1_prepend.after: Rational is held by [[Reasoning]], [[Ratio]], [[Reference Frame]], [[Carrying]], and [[Trace]]. A ratio must be accountably read, the frame must be explicit, carrying must remain answerable, and trace

c1_prepend.title: Reality-Bearing Connection
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Reality-Bearing Connection is held by [[Atlas]], [[Bearing]], and [[Retrace Read|Retrace]].
c1_prepend.before: A reality-bearing connection keeps relation readable, traceable, and answerable across fields without flattening the fields into each other.
c1_prepend.after: Reality-Bearing Connection is held by [[Atlas]], [[Bearing]], and [[Retrace Read|Retrace]].

c1_prepend.title: Reasoning
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Reasoning is held by [[Ratio]], [[Reference Frame]], [[Read]], [[Trace]], [[Practice]], [[Order Trace]], and [[Check]]. Comparison must be readable, the reference frame must be explicit, a meaningful
c1_prepend.before: A reason is the retraceable account of ratio. It is not only an explanation given after the fact. A reason asks how a ratio is held, from what reference frame, and whether it can be retraced.
c1_prepend.after: Reasoning is held by [[Ratio]], [[Reference Frame]], [[Read]], [[Trace]], [[Practice]], [[Order Trace]], and [[Check]]. Comparison must be readable, the reference frame must be explicit, a meaningful

c1_prepend.title: Relief
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Relief is held by [[Bearing Pass]], [[Root Resilience]], and [[Structural Disorder]]. A bearing pass must locate the member, the foundation must remain resilient enough to withstand member correction,
c1_prepend.before: Relief is not punishment and not rejection of growth. It is care applied where a member has begun to occlude, overload, distort, or detach from the order that lets it carry.
c1_prepend.after: Relief is held by [[Bearing Pass]], [[Root Resilience]], and [[Structural Disorder]]. A bearing pass must locate the member, the foundation must remain resilient enough to withstand member correction,

c1_prepend.title: Retrace Practice
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Retrace Practice is held by [[Trace]], [[Ground]], [[Relation]], [[Reality Mechanics]], and [[Practice]].
c1_prepend.before: Reality Mechanics is the discipline through which retraceable dependency is mapped.
c1_prepend.after: Retrace Practice is held by [[Trace]], [[Ground]], [[Relation]], [[Reality Mechanics]], and [[Practice]].

c1_prepend.title: Retracing
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Retracing is held by [[Trace]] and [[Practice]]. A backward path must be available through connection, and a participant must enter it, before retracing occurs.
c1_prepend.before: Trace is the backward availability offered by connection. Retracing is the act of entering and following that availability. Retracing may support checking, recovery, return, or understanding, but thos
c1_prepend.after: Retracing is held by [[Trace]] and [[Practice]]. A backward path must be available through connection, and a participant must enter it, before retracing occurs.

c1_prepend.title: Root Resilience
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Root Resilience is held by [[Root System]], [[Root Order]], [[Groundedness]], and [[Retrace Read|Retrace]].
c1_prepend.before: It is not an immune system, policing layer, or governance framework. Root Resilience arises where the root system remains grounded enough that branch-level drift, overgrowth, misplaced terms, or ungro
c1_prepend.after: Root Resilience is held by [[Root System]], [[Root Order]], [[Groundedness]], and [[Retrace Read|Retrace]].

c1_prepend.title: Root System
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Root System is held by [[Relation]], [[Root Order]], and [[Invariant]].
c1_prepend.before: It protects source structure without becoming produced content.
c1_prepend.after: Root System is held by [[Relation]], [[Root Order]], and [[Invariant]].

c1_prepend.title: Section
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Section is held by [[Practice]] and [[Readability]]. A participant must be in practice, and reading must be possible, before a cut made for reading can be named. It is not held by [[Boundary]]: a sect
c1_prepend.before: Section is not a condition within relation. Where [[Boundary]] names located distinction that relation already holds, Section names the cut a participant makes across relation so that a part of it can
c1_prepend.after: Section is held by [[Practice]] and [[Readability]]. A participant must be in practice, and reading must be possible, before a cut made for reading can be named. It is not held by [[Boundary]]: a sect

c1_prepend.title: Splicing
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Splicing is held by [[Bearing Pass]], [[Dependency Order]], and [[Trace]]. A bearing pass must locate the member, dependency order must distinguish real support from apparent support, and trace must m
c1_prepend.before: Splicing is needed where a read has life but is attached to the wrong support. It does not make the read true by relocation. It tests whether the read can survive when placed where its trace actually
c1_prepend.after: Splicing is held by [[Bearing Pass]], [[Dependency Order]], and [[Trace]]. A bearing pass must locate the member, dependency order must distinguish real support from apparent support, and trace must m

c1_prepend.title: Step
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Step is held by [[Read]], [[Trace]], [[Carrying]], and [[Practice]].
c1_prepend.before: Step is carrying made local as movement: the first placed movement by which a read enters practice while remaining answerable to dependency. It may support progress, but it does not require progress o
c1_prepend.after: Step is held by [[Read]], [[Trace]], [[Carrying]], and [[Practice]].

c1_prepend.title: Tend
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Tend is held by [[Practice]], [[Care]], [[Attend]], [[Recurrence]], and [[Maintained Coupling]]. Practice must be attended, care must preserve availability, and return must be recurrent enough for ten
c1_prepend.before: To tend is to stay with a relation, notice what it requires, and adjust conditions so its carrying can continue. It is not care as feeling alone. It is care made active through return.
c1_prepend.after: Tend is held by [[Practice]], [[Care]], [[Attend]], [[Recurrence]], and [[Maintained Coupling]]. Practice must be attended, care must preserve availability, and return must be recurrent enough for ten

c1_prepend.title: Terms and Conditions
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Terms and Conditions is held by [[Term]], [[Condition]], [[Groundedness]], and [[Common Term Structure]].
c1_prepend.before: The ordinary phrase is useful because it already joins terms with conditions. The Atlas reads that join structurally: a named term must remain answerable to what lets it hold.
c1_prepend.after: Terms and Conditions is held by [[Term]], [[Condition]], [[Groundedness]], and [[Common Term Structure]].

c1_prepend.title: Translation Invariance
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Translation Invariance is held by [[Atlas]], [[Root Order]], [[Term]], [[Invariant]], [[Medium]], and [[Translation Boundary]]. A mapped order, structurally placed interpretations, variation, carriers
c1_prepend.before: The Atlas is not identical to its words, signs, notes, or other inscriptions. These are carriers. A [[Term]] is a structurally placed interpretation carried through them. Translation Invariance tests
c1_prepend.after: Translation Invariance is held by [[Atlas]], [[Root Order]], [[Term]], [[Invariant]], [[Medium]], and [[Translation Boundary]]. A mapped order, structurally placed interpretations, variation, carriers

c1_prepend.title: Consciousness
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Consciousness is held by [[Recursion]], [[Read]], and [[Participation]].
c1_prepend.before: Consciousness is not cognitive participation by itself. [[Cognitive Participation]] names relation participating in readability before awareness is required. Consciousness names the read becoming avai
c1_prepend.after: Consciousness is held by [[Recursion]], [[Read]], and [[Participation]].

c1_prepend.title: Fabric
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Fabric is held by [[Thread]], [[Field Relationships]], [[Nested Carrying]], [[Invisible Bearing]], [[Surface]], and [[Trace]].
c1_prepend.before: Fabric is the face of the weave. [[Web]] is the trace of the weave.
c1_prepend.after: Fabric is held by [[Thread]], [[Field Relationships]], [[Nested Carrying]], [[Invisible Bearing]], [[Surface]], and [[Trace]].

c1_prepend.title: Hidden Bearing
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Hidden Bearing is held by [[Bearing]] and [[Higher Retrace|Retrace]]. Bearing must be operative before it can be deliberately structured not to present, and retrace must be available in principle befo
c1_prepend.before: Hidden Bearing is the engineered mode of non-presenting carrying.
c1_prepend.after: Hidden Bearing is held by [[Bearing]] and [[Higher Retrace|Retrace]]. Bearing must be operative before it can be deliberately structured not to present, and retrace must be available in principle befo

c1_prepend.title: Higher Learning
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Higher Learning is held by [[Recursion]], [[Consciousness]], [[Higher Retrace|Retrace]], and [[Self-Regulation]].
c1_prepend.before: Higher Learning is a specific form of learning. Organic learning can occur wherever participation adjusts through recurrence, feedback, instinct, repair, or compatible uptake. Higher Learning becomes
c1_prepend.after: Higher Learning is held by [[Recursion]], [[Consciousness]], [[Higher Retrace|Retrace]], and [[Self-Regulation]].

c1_prepend.title: Higher Order Crossing
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Higher Order Crossing is held by [[Higher Order]], [[Recursion]], [[Invisible Bearing]], and [[Retrace Read|Retrace]].
c1_prepend.before: At [[Higher Order]], the invisible carrier at every structural level becomes readable. Cross-order patterns such as [[Generic]], [[Degenerate]], [[Regenerate]], organic/engineered organisation, [[Recu
c1_prepend.after: Higher Order Crossing is held by [[Higher Order]], [[Recursion]], [[Invisible Bearing]], and [[Retrace Read|Retrace]].

c1_prepend.title: Higher Order
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Higher Order is held by [[Third Order]] and [[Nesting]].
c1_prepend.before: In the tree read, Higher Order is whole-tree retrace. It looks back across ground, roots, trunk, branches, terminal boundaries, visible growth, and hidden carrying without collapsing them into one lev
c1_prepend.after: Higher Order is held by [[Third Order]] and [[Nesting]].

c1_prepend.title: Invisible Bearing
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Invisible Bearing is held by [[Nested Carrying]], [[Bearing]], and [[Higher Retrace|Retrace]].
c1_prepend.before: The carrying is not hidden. It has become non-presenting through organic accumulation — the structure just is there, active, not designed to conceal itself. Retrace remains available if sought; the de
c1_prepend.after: Invisible Bearing is held by [[Nested Carrying]], [[Bearing]], and [[Higher Retrace|Retrace]].

c1_prepend.title: Legion
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Legion is held by [[Nesting]]. Prior organisation must be available within later organisation across all orders before the whole can carry as one gathered force.
c1_prepend.before: [[Nesting]] names prior organisation remaining available within later organisation. Legion is what becomes possible when nesting has accumulated through all orders: the whole can carry as a gathered f
c1_prepend.after: Legion is held by [[Nesting]]. Prior organisation must be available within later organisation across all orders before the whole can carry as one gathered force.

c1_prepend.title: Nested Carrying
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Nested Carrying is held by [[Recursion]] and [[Carrying]]. Recursion must be operative — the nested organisation must have developed the capacity to return into its own carrying — before that carrying
c1_prepend.before: The distinction matters. [[Nesting]] is the structural condition: prior is available within later. Nested Carrying is that condition becoming operative as function: the prior is not just available, it
c1_prepend.after: Nested Carrying is held by [[Recursion]] and [[Carrying]]. Recursion must be operative — the nested organisation must have developed the capacity to return into its own carrying — before that carrying

c1_prepend.title: Opacity
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Opacity is held by [[Third Order]], [[Nested Carrying]], [[Invisible Bearing]], and [[Ground]]. Third-order participation must have accumulated, Invisible Bearing must have layered past available High
c1_prepend.before: Opacity names the point where [[Invisible Bearing]] has accumulated past the threshold at which [[Higher Retrace]] can enter without [[Higher Order Crossing|disciplined practice]]. The structure conti
c1_prepend.after: Opacity is held by [[Third Order]], [[Nested Carrying]], [[Invisible Bearing]], and [[Ground]]. Third-order participation must have accumulated, Invisible Bearing must have layered past available High

c1_prepend.title: Recursion
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Recursion is held by [[Nesting]], [[Recursive]], and [[Higher Retrace|Retrace]].
c1_prepend.before: Where [[Recursive]] names carrying re-entering its own condition at second order, Recursion at higher order names a nested organisation becoming able to participate in the carrying that preserves, rev
c1_prepend.after: Recursion is held by [[Nesting]], [[Recursive]], and [[Higher Retrace|Retrace]].

c1_prepend.title: Self-Modelling
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Self-Modelling is held by [[Recursion]] and [[Consciousness]].
c1_prepend.before: Self-Modelling is not the organic source of Higher Order. It is an engineered form of recursion.
c1_prepend.after: Self-Modelling is held by [[Recursion]] and [[Consciousness]].

c1_prepend.title: Self-Regulation
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Self-Regulation is held by [[Invisible Bearing]], [[Self-Modelling]], [[Regulation]], and [[Compatibility]].
c1_prepend.before: Self-Regulation can be organic where nested bearing adjusts participation without imposed modelling.
c1_prepend.after: Self-Regulation is held by [[Invisible Bearing]], [[Self-Modelling]], [[Regulation]], and [[Compatibility]].

c1_prepend.title: Source Drift
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Source Drift is held by [[Hidden Bearing]], [[Invisible Bearing]], and [[Higher Retrace|Retrace]].
c1_prepend.before: Source Drift does not occur because a structure is nested, elevated, abstract, engineered, or powerful. It occurs where the structure carrying participation is read as what ultimately bears that parti
c1_prepend.after: Source Drift is held by [[Hidden Bearing]], [[Invisible Bearing]], and [[Higher Retrace|Retrace]].

c1_prepend.title: Web
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Web is held by [[Fabric]], [[Thread]], [[Trace]], [[Field Relationships]], and [[Pattern]]. Fabric must hold as woven continuity before its crossings can be followed as web.
c1_prepend.before: Web is not merely a network. It is the traceable weave of [[Fabric]]: the connected crossing-pattern through which threads remain followable within held continuity.
c1_prepend.after: Web is held by [[Fabric]], [[Thread]], [[Trace]], [[Field Relationships]], and [[Pattern]]. Fabric must hold as woven continuity before its crossings can be followed as web.

c1_prepend.title: Atlas
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Atlas is held by the discipline of [[Reality Mechanics]], the governing dependency arrangement of [[Root Order]], and the working postulate named by [[Theory]].
c1_prepend.before: An Operating System for Reasoning may become a future-facing evolution of the Atlas as its human and AI participation surfaces mature. It is not the current claim. The current claim is simpler: the At
c1_prepend.after: Atlas is held by the discipline of [[Reality Mechanics]], the governing dependency arrangement of [[Root Order]], and the working postulate named by [[Theory]].

c1_prepend.title: Current Record Convention
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Current Record Convention is held by [[Common Term Structure]].
c1_prepend.before: This convention is operational.
c1_prepend.after: Current Record Convention is held by [[Common Term Structure]].

c1_prepend.title: Reality Mechanics
c1_prepend.hold_sentence: Reality Mechanics is held by [[Ground]] and the working root named by [[Theory]]: it begins from what is acknowledged before the system derives its own terms.
c1_prepend.before: It begins from a working postulate: relation holds, order carries, trace places. Order becomes answerable where relation can hold, what holds can carry, and what carries can be traced back.
c1_prepend.after: Reality Mechanics is held by [[Ground]] and the working root named by [[Theory]]: it begins from what is acknowledged before the system derives its own terms.

c2_compress.title: Connection
c2_compress.hold_sentence: Connection is held by [[Relation]]. Relation must remain held for connection within relation to be available.
c2_compress.before: Connection is held by [[Relation]]. Relation must remain held before connection within relation can be read.
c2_compress.after: Connection is held by [[Relation]]. Relation must remain held for connection within relation to be available.

c2_compress.title: Hold
c2_compress.hold_sentence: Hold is held by [[Resolution]]. Bearing must be determined at the current scope before it can remain supportable.
c2_compress.before: Hold is held by [[Resolution]]. Bearing must be determined at the current scope before resolution can remain supportable as the same condition.
c2_compress.after: Hold is held by [[Resolution]]. Bearing must be determined at the current scope before it can remain supportable.
